$comment: Declarative execution-gate manifest (DATA, not a JSON-Schema document — hence no .schema. in the name). Consumed by scripts/run_gate.py via `validate.sh gate <phase> <run_folder>`. Each phase's entry_requires lists: artifacts that must resolve to a file; mechanical checks (validator + target artifact keys) the gate runs; and attested preconditions (contract-driven / judgment, no validator) the model must confirm. Source of truth for execution gating — run-core.md / run-synthesis.md reference it instead of restating the mechanical checklist. See docs/runner-governed-execution.md.

attested: all selected Tier-2 passes are complete and appended to the ledger
all auto-run audits (per contract + constraint flags) are complete and in the ledger
every deferred/declined high-risk audit is recorded as an explicit blind spot
each root cause cites >= 1 specific ledger finding (findings integration)
root-cause / revision-checklist / must-fix caps are within limits (cap compliance)
every deferred/declined high-risk audit is named where it limits confidence or readiness (blind-spot disclosure)
